mapper.select: /** UsptEvlSlctnObjcReqstDao.select */ select evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id , evl_trget_id , objc_reqst_cn , objc_reqst_dt , objc_applcnt_id , last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , dlbrt_de , dlbrt_cn , dlbrt_opetr_id , applcnt_attachment_group_id , dlbrt_attachment_group_id , reject_reason_cn , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_evl_slctn_objc_reqst where evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{evlSlctnObjcReqstId}

/** UsptEvlSlctnObjcReqstDao.selectListCount */ select count(sub.objc_reqst_id) from ( select sor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id as objc_reqst_id , sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , sor.objc_applcnt_id , uet.apply_id , ueoph.created_dt , ueoph.creator_id from uspt_evl_slctn_objc_reqst sor inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.evl_trget_id = sor.evl_trget_id left outer join ( select distinct on(evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id) evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id , creator_id , created_dt from uspt_evl_objc_process_hist where slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_03_CODE_GROUP}' order by evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id, created_dt desc ) ueoph on ueoph.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id = sor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id union all select sor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id as objc_reqst_id , sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , sor.objc_applcnt_id , ulst.apply_id , ulsoph.created_dt , ulsoph.creator_id from uspt_last_slctn_objc_reqst sor inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = sor.last_slctn_trget_id left outer join ( select distinct on(last_slctn_objc_reqst_id) last_slctn_objc_reqst_id , creator_id , created_dt from uspt_last_slctn_objc_process_hist where slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_03_CODE_GROUP}' order by last_slctn_objc_reqst_id, created_dt desc ) ulsoph on ulsoph.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id = sor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id ) sub inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = sub.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = sub.objc_applcnt_id left outer join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = sub.creator_id

/** UsptEvlSlctnObjcReqstDao.selectList */ select sub.objc_reqst_id , sub.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_CODE_GROUP}', sub.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd) as last_slctn_objc_process_sttus , ub.bsns_year , ubp.pblanc_nm , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then '상시모집' else '정시모집' end as ordtm_rcrit , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then concat(cast(ubpa.rcept_odr as varchar), '차') else '' end as rcept_odr , cm.member_nm , ci.member_nm as charger_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@DEPT_CODE_GROUP}', ci.dept_nm ) as dept_nm , to_char(sub.created_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as rcept_date , ubc.charger_author_cd , row_number() over (order by sub.created_dt desc) as rn from ( select sor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id as objc_reqst_id , sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , sor.objc_applcnt_id , uet.apply_id , ueoph.created_dt , ueoph.creator_id from uspt_evl_slctn_objc_reqst sor inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.evl_trget_id = sor.evl_trget_id left outer join ( select distinct on(evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id) evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id , creator_id , created_dt from uspt_evl_objc_process_hist where slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_03_CODE_GROUP}' order by evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id, created_dt desc ) ueoph on ueoph.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id = sor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id union all select sor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id as objc_reqst_id , sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , sor.objc_applcnt_id , ulst.apply_id , ulsoph.created_dt , ulsoph.creator_id from uspt_last_slctn_objc_reqst sor inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = sor.last_slctn_trget_id left outer join ( select distinct on(last_slctn_objc_reqst_id) last_slctn_objc_reqst_id , creator_id , created_dt from uspt_last_slctn_objc_process_hist where slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_03_CODE_GROUP}' order by last_slctn_objc_reqst_id, created_dt desc ) ulsoph on ulsoph.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id = sor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id ) sub inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = sub.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = sub.objc_applcnt_id left outer join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = sub.creator_id
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptEvlSlctnObjcReqstDao.selectDetail */ select sub.objc_reqst_id , sub.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_CODE_GROUP}', sub.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd) as last_slctn_objc_process_sttus , sub.objc_reqst_cn , sub.objc_reqst_dt , sub.objc_applcnt_id , sub.dlbrt_de , sub.dlbrt_cn , sub.applcnt_attachment_group_id , sub.dlbrt_attachment_group_id , sub.slctn_type , case when sub.slctn = true then '합격' else '탈락' end as slctn , ub.bsns_nm , ub.bsns_year , ubp.pblanc_nm , ubp.pblanc_no , ubpa.receipt_no , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then '상시모집' else '정시모집' end as ordtm_rcrit , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then concat(cast(ubpa.rcept_odr as varchar), '차') else '' end as rcept_odr , cm.member_id , cm.member_nm , cm.enc_mobile_no , ci.member_nm as charger_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@DEPT_CODE_GROUP}', ci.dept_nm ) as dept_nm , to_char(sub.created_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as rcept_date , ubc.charger_author_cd , row_number() over (order by sub.created_dt desc) as rn from ( select sor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id as objc_reqst_id , sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , sor.objc_reqst_cn , sor.objc_reqst_dt , sor.objc_applcnt_id , sor.dlbrt_de , sor.dlbrt_cn , sor.applcnt_attachment_group_id , sor.dlbrt_attachment_group_id , uet.apply_id , uet.slctn , ueoph.created_dt , ueoph.creator_id , 'EVL' as slctn_type from uspt_evl_slctn_objc_reqst sor inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.evl_trget_id = sor.evl_trget_id left outer join ( select distinct on(evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id) evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id , creator_id , created_dt from uspt_evl_objc_process_hist where slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_03_CODE_GROUP}' order by evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id, created_dt desc ) ueoph on ueoph.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id = sor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id where sor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{objcReqstId} union all select sor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id as objc_reqst_id , sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , sor.objc_reqst_cn , sor.objc_reqst_dt , sor.objc_applcnt_id , sor.dlbrt_de , sor.dlbrt_cn , sor.applcnt_attachment_group_id , sor.dlbrt_attachment_group_id , ulst.apply_id , ulst.slctn , ulsoph.created_dt , ulsoph.creator_id , 'LAST' as slctn_type from uspt_last_slctn_objc_reqst sor inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = sor.last_slctn_trget_id left outer join ( select distinct on(last_slctn_objc_reqst_id) last_slctn_objc_reqst_id , creator_id , created_dt from uspt_last_slctn_objc_process_hist where slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_03_CODE_GROUP}' order by last_slctn_objc_reqst_id, created_dt desc ) ulsoph on ulsoph.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id = sor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id where sor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{objcReqstId} ) sub inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = sub.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id left outer join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = sub.creator_id

/** UsptEvlSlctnObjcReqstDao.selectFrontDetail */ select sor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id as objc_reqst_id , sor.objc_reqst_cn , sor.objc_reqst_dt , sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_CODE_GROUP}', sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd) as last_slctn_objc_process_sttus , sor.dlbrt_de , sor.dlbrt_cn , sor.dlbrt_opetr_id , sor.applcnt_attachment_group_id , sor.dlbrt_attachment_group_id , ues.evl_step_nm , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpat.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm from uspt_evl_slctn_objc_reqst sor inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.evl_trget_id = sor.evl_trget_id inner join uspt_evl_step ues on ues.evl_step_id = uet.evl_step_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = uet.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id where sor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{objcReqstId} and sor.objc_applcnt_id = #{memberId} union all select sor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id as objc_reqst_id , sor.objc_reqst_cn , sor.objc_reqst_dt , sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSOPS_CODE_GROUP}', sor.last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd) as last_slctn_objc_process_sttus , sor.dlbrt_de , sor.dlbrt_cn , sor.dlbrt_opetr_id , sor.applcnt_attachment_group_id , sor.dlbrt_attachment_group_id , '최종선정' as evl_step_nm , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpat.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm from uspt_last_slctn_objc_reqst sor inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = sor.last_slctn_trget_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id where sor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{objcReqstId} and sor.objc_applcnt_id = #{memberId}
